title: Can window be smaller when opening up task comment
excerpt: When you open comment on the task/job you can only minimize the pop-up to a third of the screen size,can this be reduced down further so you have more screen space on the main element of the board?

posts.author: richpeers (Rich Peers)
posts.cookedHtml:
When you open comment on the task/job you can only minimize the pop-up to a third of the screen size,can this be reduced down further so you have more screen space on the main element of the board?

image1751×924 135 KB

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @richpeers !

To the best of my knowledge, there currently is no option to reduce the size of this pop-up window .

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: richpeers (Rich Peers)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @GiannisKoukounas some of my colleagues just work on laptops so they have reduced screen landscape when this pop up opens, I have 3 screens so don’t understand how you can just work on a laptop or have this issue
